item.title: Behind the Curtain: Trump's power play
item.description: President Trump seethed when the Supreme Court stripped away his unilateral tariff authority, the first real check on his presidency. Then he set out ...

item.title: Tony Gonzales drops re-election bid after pressure from GOP leadership to quit race

item.title: Scoop: Anthropic CEO apologizes for leaked memo criticizing Trump
item.description: The Pentagon has formally designated Anthropic a supply chain risk, as CEO Dario Amodei apologized Thursday for a leaked memo criticizing the Trump ad...
